title: GitHub - petejwoodbridge/dreamlab-podcaster: Convert any text (Newsletters, Essays, Whatever) into natural two-host podcast audio using AI. · GitHub
text:
Newsletter to Podcast Generator
Convert newsletters into natural two-host podcast audio using AI.
How it works:
Claude researches your newsletter topics with web search, writes a conversational script between two hosts (Elizabeth & Pete), and ElevenLabs converts the script to realistic audio with natural expression tags.
The Show
Dream Machine
- A podcast covering the latest news on AI in the creative industries: film, games, music, media, and more.
Hosts:
Elizabeth
- Lead host and AI expert who drives the conversation with deep technical insights
Pete
- Engaged co-host who asks clarifying questions and represents the audience perspective
Features
Two-step workflow
- Review and edit scripts before generating audio
Test mode
- Preview ~20 seconds of audio before committing to full generation
Web research
- Claude searches the web to add depth to discussions
Four workflow modes
- Script only, full audio, test audio, audio from existing script
Two interfaces
- CLI and Flask web app
Expression tags
- ElevenLabs v3 audio tags for natural, expressive speech
Cost-efficient
- Script review + test mode saves ~$4 per iteration
Quick Start
#
1. Install dependencies
pip install -r requirements.txt
#
2. Set up API keys
cp .env.example .env
#
Edit .env with your Anthropic and ElevenLabs API keys
#
3. Run CLI
python cli.py
#
Or run web app
python app.py
#
Open http://localhost:5000
Workflow Modes
Mode 1: Script Only (Recommended first step)
Generate a script for review before spending on audio.
CLI: Option 1
Web: Select "Script Only" from dropdown
Cost: ~$0.20
Mode 2: Script + Full Audio
One-shot pipeline for when you're confident in the output quality.
CLI: Option 2
Web: Select "Script + Full Audio"
Cost: ~$4.20
Mode 3: Script + Test Audio
Generate script and a 20-second audio preview to check voice quality.
CLI: Option 3
Web: Select "Script + 20s Test Audio"
Cost: ~$0.35
Mode 4: Audio from Existing Script
Generate audio from a previously created or manually edited script.
CLI: Option 4
Web: Edit script in textarea, click "Generate" button
Cost: ~$0.15 (test) / ~$4.00 (full)
Recommended Workflow
Generate script only
(~$0.20) - Review the dialogue
Edit the script
- Adjust tone, fix facts, add topics
Generate 20s test
(~$0.15) - Check voice quality
Generate full audio
(~$4.00) - Final production
Total: ~$4.35
with full control, vs ~$4.20 blind.
Configuration
Environment Variables
Variable
Required
Description
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
Yes
Anthropic API key for Claude
ELEVENLABS_API_KEY
Yes
ElevenLabs API key for TTS
ELIZABETH_VOICE_ID
No
ElevenLabs voice ID for Elizabeth (default: AXdMgz6evoL7OPd7eU12)
PETE_VOICE_ID
No
ElevenLabs voice ID for Pete (default: ElURLCxWvjWx3Powni9B)
Voice Settings
The system uses
ElevenLabs v3
with expression tags for natural delivery:
Emotion tags:
[excited]
,
[thoughtful]
,
[curious]
,
[surprised]
Reactions:
[laughs]
,
[chuckles]
,
[sighs]
,
[exhales]
Pacing:
[pauses]
,
[whispers]
,
[clears throat]
Tags are embedded automatically by Claude during script generation.
Output Files
All output goes to the
output/
directory:
dream_machine_script.md
- Generated podcast script
dream_machine_podcast.mp3
- Full podcast audio
dream_machine_test.mp3
- 20-second test audio
Script Format
Scripts use markdown with
**SPEAKER:**
format:
**
ELIZABETH:
**
[
excited
]
Welcome to Dream Machine! I'm Elizabeth, and today we're diving into...
**
PETE:
**
[
curious
]
Thanks Elizabeth. So what's really fascinating about this development?
**
ELIZABETH:
**
[
thoughtful
]
Great question. What really stands out is the architecture...
Python API
from
podcast_generator
import
NewsletterToPodcast
processor
=
NewsletterToPodcast
(
newsletter_content
)
# Script only
script
=
processor
.
generate_script_only
(
research
=
True
)
# Full pipeline
script_path
,
audio_path
=
processor
.
process
(
research
=
True
,
script_only
=
False
,
test_mode
=
False
)
# Audio from existing script
audio_path
=
processor
.
generate_audio_from_script
(
script_path
=
"output/dream_machine_script.md"
,
test_mode
=
True
)
Project Structure
Podcaster/
├── podcast_generator.py   # Core NewsletterToPodcast class
├── cli.py                 # Interactive CLI
├── app.py                 # Flask web application
├── templates/
│   └── index.html         # Web UI
├── output/                # Generated files
├── requirements.txt       # Dependencies
├── .env.example           # API key template
├── README.md              # This file
├── WORKFLOW_GUIDE.md      # Detailed workflow guide
└── QUICKSTART.md          # 5-minute setup
Dependencies
anthropic
- Claude API for research and script generation
elevenlabs
- Text-to-speech with realistic voices
pydub
- Audio segment combining
flask
- Web interface
python-dotenv
- Environment variable management
